sentences: I am writing to request a brief meeting with you next Monday morning to discuss an urgent matter related to our project timeline.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A company executive
B) A project team member
C) An external client
D) An accounting staff
steps.kr: 저는 프로젝트 일정과 관련된 긴급한 사안을 논의하기 위해 다음 주 월요일 오전에 귀하와의 짧은 회의를 요청드리고자 이 이메일을 씁니다.

sentences: As the project manager overseeing our department's deliverables, your approval is required before we can proceed.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A new employee
B) The entire team
C) A manager with approval authority
D) An external partner
steps.kr: 우리 부서의 산출물을 총괄하는 프로젝트 매니저로서 귀하의 승인이 있어야 진행이 가능합니다.

sentences: I would appreciate it if you could confirm your availability by replying to this email at your earliest convenience.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To report project results
B) To request a meeting time confirmation
C) To deliver work instructions
D) To cancel a project
steps.kr: 가능한 한 빨리 이 이메일에 회신하여 귀하의 일정 가능 여부를 알려주시면 감사하겠습니다.

sentences: I am contacting you regarding my order placed on April 3rd through your company's online store.
steps.question: Who is the sender of this email?
choices: A) A sales representative
B) An online store customer
C) A delivery company employee
D) A product manufacturer
steps.kr: 저는 4월 3일 귀사의 온라인 쇼핑몰에서 주문한 건과 관련하여 연락드립니다.

sentences: Your website confirmed the purchase, but I have not received any shipping notification or tracking number after five business days.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A colleague at the same company
B) A delivery tracking app manager
C) An online store representative
D) A customs officer
steps.kr: 귀사의 웹사이트에서 구매가 확인되었지만, 영업일 기준 5일이 지난 후에도 배송 알림이나 운송장 번호를 받지 못했습니다.

sentences: Could you please provide an update on the delivery status and let me know when I can expect to receive my package?
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To cancel the order
B) To request a refund
C) To inquire about delivery status
D) To request a product exchange
steps.kr: 배송 현황을 업데이트해 주시고 언제쯤 소포를 받을 수 있는지 알려주시겠습니까?

sentences: This memo is issued by the Human Resources Department to inform all staff members of an important policy change effective May 1st.
steps.question: Which department sent this memo?
choices: A) Sales Department
B) Finance Department
C) Human Resources Department
D) IT Support Department
steps.kr: 이 메모는 5월 1일부로 시행되는 중요한 정책 변경 사항을 전 직원에게 알리기 위해 인사부에서 발송합니다.

sentences: All employees, regardless of department or employment status, are required to comply with the updated attendance tracking system.
steps.question: Who is the intended audience of this memo?
choices: A) New employees only
B) Managerial staff only
C) Specific department staff only
D) All employees
steps.kr: 부서나 고용 형태에 관계없이 전 직원은 업데이트된 근태 관리 시스템을 준수해야 합니다.

sentences: Please attend the mandatory orientation session on Friday at 10 A.M. in Conference Room B to learn how to use the new system.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this memo?
choices: A) To announce a department transfer
B) To inform staff about a new system training
C) To notify employees of a holiday schedule
D) To explain a salary policy change
steps.kr: 새로운 시스템 사용법을 익히기 위해 금요일 오전 10시 B 회의실에서 진행되는 필수 오리엔테이션 세션에 참석하십시오.

sentences: I am writing on behalf of GlobalTech Customer Service in response to the complaint you submitted on March 28th.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A customer who filed a complaint
B) A product delivery staff
C) A customer service representative
D) A product manufacturing employee
steps.kr: 저는 3월 28일 귀하께서 제출하신 불만 사항에 대한 답변으로 GlobalTech 고객 서비스를 대신하여 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced with our product and understand your frustration.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A potential customer making an inquiry
B) A customer who submitted a complaint
C) A customer who already received a refund
D) An employee considering a job change
choices_kr: 신제품 구매를 문의 중인 잠재 고객
steps.kr: 저희 제품으로 인해 귀하께서 겪으신 불편함에 진심으로 사과드리며 귀하의 불만을 충분히 이해합니다.

sentences: To resolve this matter promptly, we would like to offer you a full refund or a free replacement unit, whichever you prefer.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To offer a solution to a customer complaint
B) To promote a new product
C) To explain the refund policy terms
D) To provide a discount for additional purchases
steps.kr: 이 문제를 신속히 해결하기 위해 귀하께서 원하시는 대로 전액 환불이나 무상 교체 제품 중 하나를 제공해 드리고자 합니다.

sentences: I am pleased to inform you that you have been selected for the position of Marketing Coordinator at BrightPath Inc.
steps.question: Who is the sender of this email?
choices: A) A job applicant
B) A hiring manager or recruiter
C) A headhunting agency employee
D) A payroll staff member

expressions.expr: I am pleased to inform you

steps.kr: 귀하께서 BrightPath Inc.의 마케팅 코디네이터 직책에 선발되셨음을 기쁘게 알려드립니다.

sentences: After carefully reviewing your application and your outstanding performance during the interview, our hiring team unanimously agreed on your candidacy.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A current employee
B) A job applicant awaiting results
C) An intern participant
D) A partner company representative
choices_kr: 입사 지원 후 결과를 기다리는 지원자
steps.kr: 귀하의 지원서와 면접에서의 탁월한 성과를 면밀히 검토한 결과, 저희 채용 팀은 귀하의 후보자 자격에 만장일치로 동의했습니다.

sentences: We would like you to join us on May 15th and kindly ask you to confirm your acceptance within three business days.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To inform an applicant of rejection
B) To request additional documents
C) To offer a job and request confirmation
D) To negotiate salary terms
choices_kr: 채용 합격 통보 및 입사 확인 요청
steps.kr: 5월 15일에 함께하시길 바라며, 영업일 기준 3일 이내에 수락 의사를 확인해 주시기 바랍니다.

sentences: I am submitting this expense report for my business trip to Busan from April 10 to April 12.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) An employee who returned from a business trip
B) A secretary arranging travel schedules
C) An auditor reviewing company expenses
D) A new employee trainer
steps.kr: 저는 4월 10일부터 12일까지의 부산 출장에 대한 경비 정산 보고서를 제출합니다.

sentences: As per company policy, all travel expenses must be submitted to the Finance Department within two weeks of returning from the trip.
steps.question: Which department is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) Direct supervisor's office
B) Finance Department
C) Human Resources Department
D) The accommodation in the trip destination
steps.kr: 회사 방침에 따라 모든 출장 경비는 귀국 후 2주 이내에 재무부에 제출해야 합니다.

sentences: Please process the attached receipts totaling $620 and transfer the amount to my designated bank account within five business days.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To request approval for a business trip
B) To report business trip results
C) To request expense reimbursement
D) To confirm a travel booking
choices_kr: 출장 경비 정산 및 송금 요청
steps.kr: 총 $620에 해당하는 첨부된 영수증을 처리하고 영업일 기준 5일 이내에 제 지정 은행 계좌로 금액을 이체해 주십시오.

sentences: We at Pinnacle Solutions are delighted to invite you to our annual client appreciation dinner to be held on May 20th.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A restaurant reservation service
B) An event planning agency
C) Pinnacle Solutions company
D) A local chamber of commerce
steps.kr: 저희 Pinnacle Solutions는 5월 20일에 개최될 연례 고객 감사 만찬에 귀하를 초대하게 되어 기쁩니다.

sentences: As one of our most valued long-term clients, you and one guest are cordially invited to this exclusive event at the Grand Hotel.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A new customer
B) An internal company employee
C) A long-term business client
D) A partner company sales representative
steps.kr: 저희의 가장 소중한 장기 고객 중 한 분으로서, 귀하와 동반 1명은 Grand Hotel에서의 이 특별 행사에 정중히 초대됩니다.

sentences: Kindly confirm your attendance by May 10th by replying to this email or calling our events coordinator at 555-0193.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To distribute a new product catalog
B) To negotiate an annual contract renewal
C) To invite a client and request RSVP
D) To handle a service complaint
choices_kr: 고객 감사 행사 초대 및 참석 확인 요청
steps.kr: 5월 10일까지 이 이메일에 회신하거나 행사 담당자(555-0193)에게 전화하여 참석 여부를 알려주십시오.

sentences: I am reaching out on behalf of SecureNet IT Solutions to discuss the upcoming renewal of your current service contract.
steps.question: Which company is sending this letter?
choices: A) The recipient's internal IT team
B) A government agency
C) SecureNet IT Solutions
D) An insurance service company
steps.kr: 저는 현재 서비스 계약의 갱신에 대해 논의하기 위해 SecureNet IT Solutions를 대신하여 연락드립니다.

sentences: Your current agreement with us is set to expire on June 30th, and we value the strong partnership we have built over the past three years.
steps.question: What is the relationship between the sender and recipient?
choices: A) A new customer making an inquiry
B) An existing service contract client
C) A SecureNet employee
D) A competing IT company
steps.kr: 귀하의 현재 계약은 6월 30일에 만료될 예정이며, 저희는 지난 3년간 구축한 강한 파트너십을 소중히 여깁니다.

sentences: We would like to schedule a call at your convenience to present our updated service packages and discuss pricing options that suit your needs.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this letter?
choices: A) To notify the client of contract termination
B) To apologize for a service outage
C) To arrange a call for contract renewal
D) To attract new customers
choices_kr: 서비스 계약 갱신을 위한 상담 일정 요청
steps.kr: 업데이트된 서비스 패키지를 소개하고 귀하의 필요에 맞는 가격 옵션을 논의하기 위해 편한 시간에 통화 일정을 잡고 싶습니다.

sentences: This notice is from the Training and Development Department and applies to all employees who joined the company within the past three months.
steps.question: Which department sent this memo?
choices: A) Finance Department
B) Training and Development Department
C) Marketing Department
D) General Affairs Department
steps.kr: 이 공지는 교육개발부에서 발송하며, 최근 3개월 이내에 입사한 모든 직원에게 적용됩니다.

sentences: You are required to complete the mandatory onboarding program before being assigned to your permanent team or project.
steps.question: Who is the intended audience of this memo?
choices: A) All employees
B) Senior executives
C) Newly hired employees
D) A specific project team
steps.kr: 귀하는 정규 팀 또는 프로젝트에 배정되기 전에 필수 온보딩 프로그램을 이수해야 합니다.

sentences: The program covers workplace safety, company values, communication guidelines, and an introduction to all major departments.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this memo?
choices: A) To announce department transfers
B) To explain year-end performance reviews
C) To inform new employees about the onboarding program
D) To describe employee benefits
steps.kr: 이 프로그램은 직장 안전, 회사 가치관, 커뮤니케이션 지침, 그리고 모든 주요 부서 소개를 포함합니다.

sentences: I am sending this follow-up email to summarize the key decisions made during yesterday's project status meeting.
steps.question: Who is the sender of this email?
choices: A) An external party who missed the meeting
B) The person who led or documented the meeting
C) A team member who opposed the project
D) An executive's assistant
steps.kr: 저는 어제 프로젝트 현황 회의에서 결정된 주요 사항을 요약하기 위해 이 후속 이메일을 보내드립니다.

sentences: As participants in the meeting, you are each responsible for reviewing the action items assigned to your respective teams.
steps.question: Who are the recipients of this email?
choices: A) Employees from other departments who did not attend
B) Team representatives who attended the meeting
C) All company employees
D) External auditors
choices_kr: 회의에 참석하지 않은 다른 부서 직원
steps.kr: 회의 참석자로서 귀하는 각자의 팀에 배정된 실행 항목을 검토할 책임이 있습니다.

sentences: Please submit a brief progress report on your assigned tasks by next Wednesday so we can track our overall project status.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To notify of a rescheduled meeting
B) To request budget approval for the project
C) To share meeting notes and request progress updates
D) To announce a team restructuring
choices_kr: 회의 내용 공유 및 업무 진행 보고 요청
steps.kr: 전체 프로젝트 현황을 파악할 수 있도록 다음 주 수요일까지 배정된 업무에 대한 간단한 진행 상황 보고서를 제출해 주십시오.

sentences: I am writing to confirm that your order number 8821 has been shipped and is expected to arrive within three to five business days.
steps.question: Who is the sender of this email?
choices: A) A customer checking on an order
B) A shipping company driver
C) An online store or seller confirming shipment
D) A customs clearance officer
steps.kr: 주문 번호 8821이 발송되었으며 영업일 기준 3~5일 이내에 도착할 예정임을 알려드립니다.

sentences: You can track your package using the tracking code provided below, or by visiting our website's order status page.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A delivery company employee
B) A customer who placed an order
C) A warehouse manager
D) A product quality inspector
steps.kr: 아래 제공된 추적 코드를 사용하거나 당사 웹사이트의 주문 현황 페이지를 방문하여 소포를 추적하실 수 있습니다.

sentences: If you have any questions about your delivery, please do not hesitate to contact our support team at support@shopnow.com.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To request payment for an order
B) To inform the customer of a shipping delay
C) To confirm that an order has been shipped
D) To promote a new product line
steps.kr: 배송에 관한 질문이 있으시면 support@shopnow.com으로 당사 지원팀에 주저 없이 연락해 주십시오.

sentences: I am contacting you to inquire about the bulk pricing options available for your company's office furniture products.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A furniture manufacturer
B) A potential bulk buyer
C) A warehouse logistics manager
D) A retail store owner buying for personal use
steps.kr: 귀사의 사무용 가구 제품에 대한 대량 구매 가격 옵션을 문의드리고자 연락드립니다.

sentences: Your company was recommended to us by a colleague who recently furnished an entire office floor using your products.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) The colleague who made the recommendation
B) An office furniture supplier or vendor
C) An interior design consultant
D) A real estate agent
steps.kr: 최근 귀사의 제품으로 사무실 한 층 전체를 꾸민 동료에게 귀사를 추천받았습니다.

sentences: Please send us your product catalog and current price list so we can evaluate the options for our upcoming office renovation.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To complain about furniture quality
B) To request a catalog and pricing information
C) To cancel an existing order
D) To schedule a product demonstration
steps.kr: 다가오는 사무실 리모델링을 위한 옵션을 검토할 수 있도록 제품 카탈로그와 현재 가격표를 보내 주십시오.

sentences: I am writing to confirm your appointment with Dr. Lee on Thursday, April 17th at 2:30 P.M. at our downtown clinic.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A patient requesting an appointment
B) A clinic or hospital administrator
C) A health insurance company
D) A medical equipment supplier
steps.kr: 4월 17일 목요일 오후 2시 30분에 저희 시내 클리닉에서 이 박사님과의 예약을 확인해 드립니다.

sentences: You are reminded to bring your insurance card and any previous medical records that may be relevant to your visit.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A doctor scheduling patient visits
B) A medical insurance agent
C) A patient with an upcoming appointment
D) A pharmacy staff member
steps.kr: 보험 카드와 방문과 관련될 수 있는 이전 의료 기록을 지참하시기 바랍니다.

sentences: If you need to reschedule or cancel your appointment, please call us at least 24 hours in advance at 02-555-7788.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To request the patient's medical history
B) To confirm an appointment and provide instructions
C) To inform the patient of a billing issue
D) To recommend a specialist referral
choices_kr: 예약 확인 및 안내 사항 전달
steps.kr: 예약을 변경하거나 취소해야 하는 경우 최소 24시간 전에 02-555-7788로 연락해 주십시오.

sentences: I am pleased to announce on behalf of management that Ms. Sandra Park has been promoted to the position of Regional Sales Director effective immediately.
steps.question: Who is making this announcement?
choices: A) Ms. Sandra Park herself
B) A company management representative
C) The sales team members
D) A recruitment agency
steps.kr: 경영진을 대신하여 Sandra Park 씨가 즉시 효력을 갖는 지역 영업 이사직으로 승진되었음을 기쁘게 알려드립니다.

sentences: Ms. Park has been with our organization for eight years and has consistently exceeded her sales targets in the Southeast Asia region.
steps.question: Who is this announcement about?
choices: A) A newly hired employee
B) A long-serving employee being promoted
C) A departing employee
D) A temporary contract worker
steps.kr: Park 씨는 8년간 우리 조직에서 근무하며 동남아시아 지역에서 판매 목표를 지속적으로 초과 달성해 왔습니다.

sentences: Please join us in congratulating Ms. Park and extending your full support as she takes on her new responsibilities.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this memo?
choices: A) To recruit a new sales director
B) To announce an employee promotion
C) To report quarterly sales performance
D) To request increased sales targets
steps.kr: Park 씨가 새로운 임무를 맡음에 따라 축하를 전하고 충분한 지원을 부탁드립니다.

sentences: This is a notice from the Facilities Management Team regarding an upcoming safety inspection scheduled for next Tuesday.
steps.question: Who sent this notice?
choices: A) The company president
B) The Facilities Management Team
C) The fire department
D) An external safety inspection agency
steps.kr: 이것은 다음 주 화요일로 예정된 안전 점검과 관련하여 시설 관리팀에서 보내는 공지입니다.

sentences: All staff members are requested to ensure their workspaces are tidy and that all fire exits remain unobstructed during the inspection.
steps.question: Who is this notice directed at?
choices: A) External visitors only
B) Cleaning service contractors
C) All staff members
D) Security personnel only
steps.kr: 모든 직원은 점검 중에 작업 공간을 깔끔하게 유지하고 모든 비상구가 막히지 않도록 요청드립니다.

sentences: Inspectors will visit each floor from 9 A.M. to 12 P.M., and any equipment or materials blocking hallways must be removed beforehand.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this notice?
choices: A) To announce a fire drill exercise
B) To inform staff about a safety inspection and preparation requirements
C) To report the results of a previous inspection
D) To introduce new safety equipment
choices_kr: 안전 점검 및 준비 사항 안내
steps.kr: 검사관들은 오전 9시부터 오후 12시까지 각 층을 방문할 예정이며, 복도를 막는 장비나 자재는 사전에 제거해야 합니다.

sentences: I am writing to schedule your annual performance review, which is due to take place during the first two weeks of May.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) An employee requesting a pay raise
B) A supervisor or HR manager scheduling reviews
C) A colleague asking for feedback
D) A union representative
choices_kr: 리뷰 일정을 잡는 상사 또는 인사 담당자
steps.kr: 5월 첫 2주 동안 진행될 예정인 연간 성과 평가 일정을 잡기 위해 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: You will have the opportunity to discuss your achievements, goals, and any concerns you may have about your current role.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A job applicant
B) An employee due for a performance review
C) A new team manager
D) A retired employee
steps.kr: 귀하는 현재 역할에 대한 성과, 목표, 그리고 우려 사항을 논의할 기회를 갖게 됩니다.

sentences: Please reply with your preferred time slot from the options listed below so I can finalize the schedule.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To inform an employee of termination
B) To schedule an annual performance review meeting
C) To request a project status update
D) To announce a new company policy
choices_kr: 연간 성과 평가 회의 일정 잡기
steps.kr: 일정을 확정할 수 있도록 아래 나열된 옵션 중 원하시는 시간대를 회신해 주십시오.

sentences: I am reaching out to inform you that your invoice number 4492, totaling $3,200, is now 30 days overdue.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A customer requesting a refund
B) A creditor or accounts receivable representative
C) A bank notifying of a transaction
D) A tax authority sending a notice
steps.kr: 청구서 번호 4492, 총액 $3,200이 현재 30일 연체되었음을 알려드리기 위해 연락드립니다.

sentences: As a valued client, we understand that delays can occur, but we kindly ask that you settle the outstanding balance at your earliest convenience.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A new customer making a first purchase
B) An existing client with an overdue payment
C) A vendor waiting for a delivery
D) An employee requesting a salary advance
steps.kr: 소중한 고객으로서 지연이 발생할 수 있음을 이해하지만, 가능한 한 빨리 미지급 잔액을 결제해 주시기를 정중히 요청드립니다.

sentences: If payment has already been made, please disregard this notice and accept our apologies for any inconvenience caused.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To confirm receipt of a payment
B) To remind a client about an overdue invoice
C) To offer a discount on a future purchase
D) To terminate a business relationship
steps.kr: 이미 결제하셨다면 이 공지를 무시하시고 불편을 드린 점 사과드립니다.

sentences: We at Horizon Financial Group are delighted to welcome you as a new client and look forward to supporting your financial goals.
steps.question: Who is sending this letter?
choices: A) A government tax agency
B) Horizon Financial Group
C) A credit bureau
D) A new client seeking services

expressions.expr: welcome you as a new client

steps.kr: 저희 Horizon Financial Group은 귀하를 신규 고객으로 환영하게 되어 기쁘며 귀하의 재정 목표를 지원하기를 기대합니다.

sentences: Your account has been successfully set up, and you will receive your welcome kit along with your account details within seven business days.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this letter?
choices: A) A long-term existing client
B) A company employee
C) A newly registered client
D) A potential investor
steps.kr: 귀하의 계좌가 성공적으로 개설되었으며, 영업일 기준 7일 이내에 환영 패키지와 계좌 세부 정보를 받으실 것입니다.

sentences: Please do not hesitate to contact your dedicated relationship manager, Ms. Yoon, at any time should you have any questions or concerns.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this letter?
choices: A) To inform a client of account closure
B) To welcome a new client and provide account setup information
C) To request updated personal information
D) To offer a new financial product
choices_kr: 신규 고객 환영 및 계좌 개설 정보 제공
steps.kr: 질문이나 우려 사항이 있으시면 언제든지 귀하의 전담 관계 관리자인 Yoon 씨에게 주저 없이 연락하십시오.

sentences: I am writing to acknowledge receipt of your application for the position of Software Engineer at DataCore Systems.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A job applicant following up
B) A DataCore Systems HR representative
C) A professional reference
D) A university career center
steps.kr: DataCore Systems의 소프트웨어 엔지니어 직책에 대한 귀하의 지원서 수신을 확인하기 위해 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: Your application is currently under review by our hiring committee, and we will contact you within two weeks regarding the next steps.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A committee member reviewing applications
B) A person who applied for a job position
C) A department manager requesting staff
D) An external recruiter
steps.kr: 귀하의 지원서는 현재 채용 위원회의 검토를 받고 있으며, 2주 이내에 다음 단계에 관해 연락드릴 것입니다.

sentences: We appreciate your interest in joining our team and will be in touch soon with further information about the selection process.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To invite the applicant to an interview
B) To reject the job application
C) To confirm receipt of the job application
D) To request additional documents
steps.kr: 저희 팀에 합류하고자 하는 귀하의 관심에 감사드리며, 선발 과정에 대한 추가 정보를 곧 알려드리겠습니다.

sentences: This is to notify all staff that our head office will be relocating to 45 Harbor Tower, Suite 800, effective June 1st.
steps.question: Who is sending this notice?
choices: A) A building maintenance company
B) Company management or administration
C) A moving company
D) Individual employees announcing their departure
steps.kr: 저희 본사가 6월 1일부로 Harbor Tower 45, Suite 800으로 이전할 예정임을 모든 직원에게 알려드립니다.

sentences: All employees are expected to update their business cards, email signatures, and any official documents with the new address immediately.
steps.question: Who is this memo directed at?
choices: A) Clients being notified of the move
B) The building management team
C) All company employees
D) New hires only
steps.kr: 모든 직원은 즉시 명함, 이메일 서명 및 공식 문서를 새 주소로 업데이트해야 합니다.

sentences: For assistance with the transition, please contact the Administration Department by May 15th so that proper arrangements can be made.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this memo?
choices: A) To announce the company's merger with another firm
B) To inform employees about the office relocation
C) To introduce new office seating arrangements
D) To request employee feedback on office facilities
choices_kr: 사무실 시설에 대한 직원 피드백 요청
steps.kr: 전환을 지원받으려면 5월 15일까지 행정부에 연락하여 적절한 준비가 이루어질 수 있도록 하십시오.

sentences: We are writing to inform you that our online services will be unavailable on Saturday, April 19th, from 2:00 A.M. to 6:00 A.M. due to scheduled maintenance.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A customer reporting a technical issue
B) A service provider announcing a maintenance window
C) An IT technician requesting access
D) A government cybersecurity agency
choices_kr: 유지 보수 일정을 알리는 서비스 제공자
steps.kr: 정기 유지 보수로 인해 4월 19일 토요일 오전 2시부터 6시까지 온라인 서비스를 이용할 수 없음을 알려드립니다.

sentences: We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and recommend that you plan any time-sensitive tasks before or after the maintenance window.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) The company's internal IT staff
B) Service users who may be affected by the outage
C) A software vendor hired for the maintenance
D) A data backup service provider
choices_kr: 유지 보수를 위해 고용된 소프트웨어 벤더
steps.kr: 불편을 드려 죄송하며, 유지 보수 시간 전이나 후에 시간이 중요한 작업을 계획하실 것을 권장드립니다.

sentences: Full services will be restored by 6:00 A.M., and our team will be available to assist you if you experience any issues after the maintenance.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To report a security breach to users
B) To notify users of a planned service outage
C) To introduce an upgraded version of the service
D) To request users to update their account passwords
steps.kr: 오전 6시까지 전체 서비스가 복구될 예정이며, 유지 보수 후 문제가 발생하면 저희 팀이 도와드릴 것입니다.

sentences: I am writing to let you know that your subscription to PremiumPlus is set to renew automatically on May 3rd for an annual fee of $99.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A subscriber requesting cancellation
B) A subscription service provider
C) A bank processing the payment
D) A consumer protection agency
steps.kr: 귀하의 PremiumPlus 구독이 5월 3일에 연간 요금 $99로 자동 갱신될 예정임을 알려드립니다.

sentences: You are receiving this reminder because your current subscription will expire in seven days, and we want to ensure uninterrupted access to all features.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A person who just subscribed for the first time
B) A subscriber whose plan is about to expire
C) A business partner being offered a discounted rate
D) A customer who recently cancelled their subscription
steps.kr: 현재 구독이 7일 후 만료될 예정이므로 이 알림을 보내드리며, 모든 기능에 중단 없이 접근하실 수 있도록 하고자 합니다.

sentences: If you wish to cancel before the renewal date, please visit your account settings or contact our billing team at billing@premiumplus.com.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To promote a new subscription tier
B) To remind a subscriber of an upcoming renewal
C) To notify a subscriber of a price increase
D) To confirm a recent subscription cancellation
steps.kr: 갱신일 이전에 취소를 원하시면 계정 설정을 방문하거나 billing@premiumplus.com으로 청구 팀에 연락해 주십시오.

sentences: I am writing to request a letter of recommendation for my graduate school application to Seoul National University's MBA program.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A university admissions officer
B) A student applying to a graduate program
C) A professor who writes recommendations
D) An MBA program coordinator
steps.kr: 서울대학교 MBA 프로그램 대학원 지원을 위한 추천서를 요청하기 위해 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: You have been an invaluable mentor throughout my undergraduate studies, and I believe your endorsement would greatly strengthen my application.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A fellow student applying to the same program
B) A former professor or mentor
C) An admissions committee member
D) A career counselor
steps.kr: 귀하는 제 학부 과정 내내 매우 소중한 멘토였으며, 귀하의 추천이 제 지원을 크게 강화할 것이라고 생각합니다.

sentences: The application deadline is June 30th, and I would be grateful if you could submit the recommendation letter by June 20th if possible.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To thank a professor for a previous recommendation
B) To request a letter of recommendation for a graduate school application
C) To ask a professor for academic advice
D) To invite a professor to a graduation ceremony
steps.kr: 지원 마감일은 6월 30일이며, 가능하다면 6월 20일까지 추천서를 제출해 주시면 감사하겠습니다.

sentences: I am writing on behalf of the Social Committee to invite you to our annual team-building event this coming Saturday.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A company executive
B) A Social Committee representative
C) An external event company
D) A new employee organizing a welcome party
steps.kr: 이번 주 토요일 연례 팀 빌딩 행사에 초대하기 위해 친목 위원회를 대신하여 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: All team members, including both full-time and part-time staff, are warmly encouraged to attend and bring their families if they wish.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) External guests and VIP clients
B) All team members regardless of employment type
C) Only full-time employees
D) Senior management staff only
steps.kr: 정규직 및 파트타임 직원을 포함한 모든 팀원이 참석하고, 원하시면 가족도 함께 데려오시기를 따뜻하게 권장합니다.

sentences: Please RSVP by this Wednesday so we can arrange catering and activity supplies for the appropriate number of attendees.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To announce a mandatory work overtime session
B) To invite employees to a team-building event and request RSVP
C) To gather employee feedback on company culture
D) To organize a farewell party for a departing colleague
choices_kr: 직원 팀 빌딩 행사 초대 및 참석 여부 확인 요청
회사 문화에 대한 직원 피드백 수집
퇴직 동료를 위한 송별 파티 준비
steps.kr: 적절한 인원수를 위한 음식 서비스와 활동 용품을 준비할 수 있도록 이번 수요일까지 참석 여부를 알려주십시오.

sentences: I am writing to inform you that a product recall has been issued for the BlendMaster Pro 3000 purchased between January and March of this year.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A customer who experienced a product issue
B) A product manufacturer or retailer issuing a recall
C) A consumer safety watchdog organization
D) A repair technician offering a fix
steps.kr: 올해 1월부터 3월 사이에 구매한 BlendMaster Pro 3000에 대해 제품 리콜이 발표되었음을 알려드립니다.

sentences: If you purchased this product, you are advised to stop using it immediately as a potential electrical fault has been identified.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A retailer that sells the product
B) A customer who may have purchased the recalled product
C) A factory worker involved in production
D) A quality control inspector
choices_kr: 리콜된 제품을 구매했을 수 있는 고객
steps.kr: 잠재적인 전기 결함이 확인되었으므로 이 제품을 구매하셨다면 즉시 사용을 중단하시기 바랍니다.

sentences: Please visit our website or call 1-800-555-3322 to arrange for a free replacement unit or a full refund of your purchase price.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To promote an upgraded version of the product
B) To notify customers of a product recall and offer a remedy
C) To extend the product warranty period
D) To survey customers about product satisfaction
choices_kr: 제품 리콜 통보 및 해결책 제공
steps.kr: 무상 교체 제품 또는 구매 가격 전액 환불을 받으시려면 저희 웹사이트를 방문하거나 1-800-555-3322로 전화해 주십시오.

sentences: I am writing to propose a strategic partnership between your company, NovaBridge Technologies, and our firm, GreenLeaf Consulting.
steps.question: Who is sending this letter?
choices: A) NovaBridge Technologies
B) GreenLeaf Consulting
C) A government trade office
D) A third-party mediator
steps.kr: 귀사 NovaBridge Technologies와 저희 회사 GreenLeaf Consulting 간의 전략적 파트너십을 제안하기 위해 이 편지를 씁니다.

sentences: Your company's expertise in cloud infrastructure, combined with our experience in sustainability consulting, could create exceptional value for clients in the green tech sector.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this letter?
choices: A) GreenLeaf Consulting's internal management team
B) NovaBridge Technologies, a cloud infrastructure company
C) A green energy investment fund
D) A regulatory government body
steps.kr: 클라우드 인프라에 대한 귀사의 전문성과 저희의 지속 가능성 컨설팅 경험이 결합되면 그린 테크 분야 고객들에게 탁월한 가치를 창출할 수 있습니다.

sentences: I would welcome the opportunity to schedule an introductory call at your convenience to explore how we might collaborate effectively.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this letter?
choices: A) To request investment funding from a partner company
B) To propose a business partnership and arrange an initial meeting
C) To file a complaint about a competitor
D) To announce a company merger already in progress
choices_kr: 비즈니스 파트너십 제안 및 초기 회의 일정 조율
steps.kr: 효과적으로 협력할 수 있는 방법을 모색하기 위해 귀하가 편한 시간에 초기 통화 기회를 갖기를 환영합니다.

sentences: I am writing to request approval for a budget increase of $15,000 for the Q3 marketing campaign, which has exceeded its initial scope.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A finance officer denying a budget request
B) A marketing team member requesting additional funds
C) A client requesting a campaign update
D) An auditor reviewing campaign expenses
steps.kr: 초기 범위를 초과한 3분기 마케팅 캠페인을 위한 $15,000 예산 증가 승인을 요청하기 위해 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: As the department head with budget approval authority, your sign-off is needed before we can proceed with the additional expenditures.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A junior team member managing the campaign
B) An external marketing agency
C) A department head with budget approval authority
D) A client reviewing the marketing plan
steps.kr: 예산 승인 권한이 있는 부서장으로서 추가 지출을 진행하기 전에 귀하의 결재가 필요합니다.

sentences: I have attached a revised budget breakdown and a justification report for your review, and I am available to discuss this further at your convenience.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To report the successful completion of the campaign
B) To request approval for additional marketing funds
C) To introduce a new marketing strategy
D) To reschedule a campaign launch date
steps.kr: 검토를 위해 수정된 예산 내역과 타당성 보고서를 첨부했으며, 편한 시간에 추가 논의를 위해 대기하고 있습니다.

sentences: I am writing to inform you that your application to become a registered vendor for Citywide Procurement Services has been approved.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A vendor applying for registration
B) Citywide Procurement Services
C) A trade association reviewing applications
D) A legal firm processing vendor contracts
steps.kr: Citywide Procurement Services의 등록 공급업체 신청이 승인되었음을 알려드립니다.

sentences: Your company will now be eligible to bid on government contracts and supply agreements valued up to $500,000 per project.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A government employee managing contracts
B) A company that applied for vendor registration
C) A competing vendor checking bid eligibility
D) A budget committee member
steps.kr: 이제 귀사는 프로젝트당 $500,000까지 정부 계약 및 공급 계약 입찰에 참여할 자격이 생겼습니다.

sentences: Please log in to our vendor portal using the credentials provided below to complete the onboarding process and access available contracts.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To reject a vendor's application
B) To notify a vendor of approved registration and provide next steps
C) To invite a vendor to a procurement workshop
D) To request additional documents before making a decision
choices_kr: 승인된 등록을 공급업체에 알리고 다음 단계 안내
steps.kr: 아래 제공된 자격 증명을 사용하여 공급업체 포털에 로그인하여 온보딩 과정을 완료하고 이용 가능한 계약에 접근하십시오.

sentences: I am excited to announce the official kickoff of Project Horizon, which will begin on Monday, April 21st, with all assigned team members.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A client requesting a project update
B) A project leader or manager launching a new project
C) A procurement officer awarding a contract
D) A team member raising a concern
choices_kr: 새 프로젝트를 시작하는 프로젝트 리더 또는 관리자
steps.kr: 4월 21일 월요일에 배정된 팀원 전원과 함께 Project Horizon의 공식 시작을 알리게 되어 기쁩니다.

sentences: Each of you has been selected based on your specific skill set, and your contributions will be critical to the project's success.
steps.question: Who are the recipients of this email?
choices: A) Company executives reviewing the project plan
B) Team members assigned to the new project
C) External consultants evaluating the project
D) Clients who will receive the final deliverable
steps.kr: 각자의 특정 기술 집합을 바탕으로 선발되었으며, 여러분의 기여가 프로젝트 성공에 매우 중요합니다.

sentences: Please join our kickoff meeting this Monday at 9 A.M. in the main conference room to review the project timeline and assign initial tasks.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To cancel a delayed project
B) To announce the start of a new project and invite the team to a kickoff meeting
C) To request additional team members for a project
D) To report the completion of a previous project
choices_kr: 새 프로젝트 시작 발표 및 킥오프 회의 초대
steps.kr: 프로젝트 일정 검토와 초기 업무 배분을 위해 이번 월요일 오전 9시 메인 회의실에서 열리는 킥오프 회의에 참석해 주십시오.

sentences: We are reaching out to gather your feedback on your recent experience with our customer support team.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A customer complaining about service
B) A company collecting customer feedback
C) A third-party survey company
D) A consumer advocacy group
steps.kr: 최근 저희 고객 지원팀과의 경험에 대한 귀하의 피드백을 수집하기 위해 연락드립니다.

sentences: As a customer who recently contacted us regarding a billing issue, your opinion is extremely valuable to us.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A new customer who has never contacted support
B) A customer who recently used the support service
C) An employee who handles customer complaints
D) A business partner being surveyed about services
choices_kr: 지원팀에 연락한 적 없는 신규 고객
steps.kr: 최근 청구 문제와 관련하여 저희에게 연락하신 고객으로서, 귀하의 의견은 저희에게 매우 귀중합니다.

sentences: Please take a few minutes to complete the short survey linked below, and let us know how we can improve our services.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To notify a customer of a resolved billing issue
B) To request a customer to complete a feedback survey
C) To offer a loyalty reward for past purchases
D) To ask a customer to update their account information
choices_kr: 과거 구매에 대한 로열티 보상 제공
steps.kr: 아래 링크된 짧은 설문을 작성하는 데 몇 분을 내주시고, 저희 서비스를 어떻게 개선할 수 있는지 알려주십시오.

sentences: I am writing to follow up on the warranty claim I submitted on March 15th for my defective laptop model TXL-900.
steps.question: Who is the sender of this email?
choices: A) A repair technician providing a status update
B) A customer following up on a warranty claim
C) A quality control manager reviewing defects
D) A shipping courier tracking a returned item
steps.kr: 3월 15일에 제출한 결함이 있는 노트북 TXL-900에 대한 보증 청구를 후속 확인하기 위해 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: Your customer service team confirmed receipt of the claim and indicated that a response would be provided within ten business days.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A friend who recommended the product
B) A company whose customer service handled the claim
C) A third-party repair shop
D) An online marketplace that sold the product
steps.kr: 귀사의 고객 서비스팀이 클레임 접수를 확인하고 영업일 기준 10일 이내에 답변이 제공될 것이라고 했습니다.

sentences: As it has now been three weeks with no update, I kindly ask for an update on the status of my claim and an estimated resolution date.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To submit a new warranty claim for a different product
B) To request an update on an existing warranty claim
C) To cancel the warranty claim and request a refund instead
D) To praise the company for its customer service
choices_kr: 다른 제품에 대한 새 보증 청구 제출
기존 보증 청구에 대한 업데이트 요청
steps.kr: 3주가 지났지만 업데이트가 없으므로, 클레임 상태와 예상 해결 날짜에 대한 업데이트를 정중히 요청드립니다.

sentences: I am pleased to offer you a paid internship position in the Digital Marketing division of our company, starting June 1st for a period of three months.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) An internship applicant confirming acceptance
B) A company offering an internship position
C) A university career office forwarding an offer
D) A former intern recommending a colleague
choices_kr: 채용 제안을 전달하는 대학 취업 사무소
steps.kr: 6월 1일부터 3개월간 당사 디지털 마케팅 부서의 유급 인턴십 직책을 제공하게 되어 기쁩니다.

sentences: You were selected from over 200 applicants based on your impressive portfolio and your strong academic background in communications.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A hiring manager reviewing applicants
B) A student who applied for and was selected for the internship
C) A university professor who submitted a recommendation
D) A team leader who will supervise the intern
steps.kr: 200명 이상의 지원자 중에서 귀하의 인상적인 포트폴리오와 커뮤니케이션 분야의 강력한 학문적 배경을 바탕으로 선발되었습니다.

sentences: Please confirm your acceptance of this offer by responding to this email by April 25th, and we will send you the necessary paperwork to complete before your start date.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To reject an internship application
B) To offer an internship position and request acceptance confirmation
C) To request additional application materials
D) To inform the applicant of a delayed hiring decision
choices_kr: 인턴십 직책 제공 및 수락 확인 요청
steps.kr: 4월 25일까지 이 이메일에 회신하여 이 제안의 수락을 확인해 주시면, 시작일 이전에 완료해야 할 필요한 서류를 보내드리겠습니다.

sentences: I am writing to inform you that your registration for the Global Innovation Conference 2025 has been successfully confirmed.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A conference attendee checking registration status
B) The conference organizer confirming registration
C) A travel agency booking hotel accommodations
D) A sponsor requesting exhibition space
steps.kr: 귀하의 Global Innovation Conference 2025 등록이 성공적으로 확인되었음을 알려드립니다.

sentences: You are registered as a keynote session attendee, and your access badge will be available for pickup at the registration desk upon arrival.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A conference speaker preparing a presentation
B) A registered conference attendee
C) A staff member helping run the conference
D) A journalist covering the conference
steps.kr: 귀하는 기조연설 세션 참가자로 등록되어 있으며, 도착 시 등록 데스크에서 출입 배지를 수령하실 수 있습니다.

sentences: The conference will be held at the Seoul International Convention Center on May 22nd and 23rd, and the full program schedule is attached for your reference.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To invite a speaker to present at the conference
B) To confirm a conference registration and provide event details
C) To remind an attendee to complete payment
D) To request feedback after a conference
choices_kr: 컨퍼런스 등록 확인 및 행사 세부 정보 제공
steps.kr: 컨퍼런스는 5월 22일과 23일에 서울 국제 컨벤션 센터에서 개최되며, 참고용으로 전체 프로그램 일정이 첨부되어 있습니다.

sentences: I am writing to notify you that your request for a return and refund for order number 5566 has been approved.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A customer requesting a refund
B) A retailer or e-commerce company processing a refund
C) A bank reversing a transaction
D) A shipping carrier returning a package
choices_kr: 환불을 처리하는 소매업체 또는 전자상거래 회사
steps.kr: 주문 번호 5566에 대한 반품 및 환불 요청이 승인되었음을 알려드립니다.

sentences: Your refund of $78.50 will be credited back to your original payment method within five to seven business days.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A store manager reviewing return policies
B) A customer whose refund request was approved
C) A finance officer processing transactions
D) A courier company handling the return shipment
steps.kr: 귀하의 환불액 $78.50은 영업일 기준 5~7일 이내에 원래 결제 방법으로 환불될 것입니다.

sentences: Please note that it may take additional time for the amount to appear on your statement depending on your bank's processing schedule.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To reject a customer's refund request
B) To confirm that a refund has been approved and explain the timeline
C) To offer store credit in place of a cash refund
D) To request the customer to return the item before processing the refund
choices_kr: 현금 환불 대신 매장 크레딧 제공
환불 처리 전 고객에게 물품 반환 요청
steps.kr: 은행의 처리 일정에 따라 금액이 명세서에 나타나는 데 추가 시간이 걸릴 수 있음을 참고하십시오.

sentences: This memo is to announce the retirement of Mr. James Choi, our Chief Financial Officer, who will be leaving the company on April 30th after 22 years of dedicated service.
steps.question: Who is making this announcement?
choices: A) Mr. James Choi announcing his own retirement
B) Company management making the official announcement
C) The board of directors
D) HR department sharing a personal request
choices_kr: James Choi 씨가 직접 은퇴 발표
steps.kr: 22년의 헌신적인 근무를 마치고 4월 30일에 회사를 떠날 예정인 최고 재무 책임자 James Choi 씨의 은퇴를 알립니다.

sentences: Under his leadership, our company's revenue grew by 340%, and he played a pivotal role in navigating us through two major economic downturns.
steps.question: Who is this memo primarily about?
choices: A) A new CFO being introduced to the company
B) A retiring senior executive, Mr. James Choi
C) All employees being informed of leadership changes
D) A new financial policy being implemented
choices_kr: 은퇴하는 고위 임원 James Choi 씨
steps.kr: 그의 리더십 하에 회사 수익이 340% 성장했으며, 두 번의 주요 경기 침체를 헤쳐나가는 데 중추적인 역할을 했습니다.

sentences: A farewell reception will be held in his honor on April 28th in the executive lounge from 4:00 P.M. to 6:00 P.M., and all staff are welcome to attend.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this memo?
choices: A) To announce the hiring of a new CFO
B) To inform staff of a senior executive's retirement and invite them to a farewell event
C) To explain changes in the company's financial reporting structure
D) To celebrate the company's annual revenue milestone
choices_kr: 고위 임원 은퇴 안내 및 송별 행사 초대
steps.kr: 4월 28일 오후 4시부터 6시까지 임원 라운지에서 그를 기리는 송별 리셉션이 열리며, 모든 직원이 참석할 수 있습니다.

sentences: I am writing to confirm your hotel reservation at the Grand Palace Hotel, Seoul, for three nights from May 5th to May 8th.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A traveler checking reservation availability
B) The hotel confirming a guest's reservation
C) A travel agency making a booking on behalf of a client
D) A credit card company processing the hotel charge
steps.kr: 5월 5일부터 8일까지 3박 동안 서울 Grand Palace Hotel 예약이 확인되었음을 알려드립니다.

sentences: You have booked a Superior King Room with breakfast included, and the total charge of $420 has been applied to your registered credit card.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A hotel employee assigned to the room
B) A guest who made the hotel reservation
C) A corporate travel manager booking for multiple employees
D) A conference organizer arranging guest accommodations
choices_kr: 여러 직원을 위해 예약하는 기업 여행 관리자
steps.kr: 아침 식사가 포함된 슈피리어 킹 룸을 예약하셨으며, 총 요금 $420이 등록된 신용카드에 청구되었습니다.

sentences: Should you need to modify or cancel your reservation, please contact us at least 48 hours before your check-in date to avoid any cancellation fees.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To request the guest to confirm payment details
B) To confirm a hotel reservation and provide key information
C) To offer an upgrade to the guest's booked room
D) To notify the guest of an issue with their reservation
choices_kr: 호텔 예약 확인 및 주요 정보 제공
steps.kr: 예약을 변경하거나 취소해야 하는 경우 취소 수수료를 피하기 위해 체크인 날짜 최소 48시간 전에 저희에게 연락해 주십시오.

sentences: I am writing to follow up on the insurance claim I filed on March 20th following a water damage incident at my property.
steps.question: Who is the sender of this email?
choices: A) An insurance adjuster processing claims
B) A policyholder following up on a claim
C) A plumber who assessed the water damage
D) A property management company
steps.kr: 부동산 수해 사고 이후 3월 20일에 제출한 보험 청구를 후속 확인하기 위해 이 이메일을 드립니다.

sentences: Your representative informed me that the claim would be reviewed within 15 business days, but I have not received any communication since then.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A property inspector who assessed the damage
B) The insurance company that received the claim
C) A neighbor affected by the same incident
D) A contractor hired to repair the damage
steps.kr: 귀사의 담당자가 청구가 영업일 기준 15일 이내에 검토될 것이라고 했지만, 그 이후로 아무런 연락을 받지 못했습니다.

sentences: Please provide an update on the current status of my claim, including when I can expect a decision and the estimated settlement amount.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To submit a new insurance claim for a different incident
B) To request an update on an existing insurance claim
C) To dispute the settlement amount offered by the insurer
D) To cancel the insurance policy
choices_kr: 다른 사고에 대한 새 보험 청구 제출
기존 보험 청구에 대한 업데이트 요청
보험사가 제시한 합의 금액 이의 제기
steps.kr: 결정 예상 시기와 예상 합의 금액을 포함하여 현재 청구 상태에 대한 업데이트를 제공해 주십시오.

sentences: I am delighted to inform you that you have been awarded the Kim Young-soo Academic Excellence Scholarship for the upcoming academic year.
steps.question: Who is sending this letter?
choices: A) A student applying for a scholarship
B) A scholarship committee or awarding institution
C) A parent submitting their child's application
D) A financial aid office requesting additional documents
choices_kr: 추가 서류를 요청하는 재정 지원 사무소
steps.kr: 다가오는 학년도를 위한 김영수 학업 우수 장학금을 수상하게 되었음을 기쁘게 알려드립니다.

sentences: You were selected from 350 applicants based on your outstanding GPA of 4.0 and your exceptional community service record.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this letter?
choices: A) A professor who submitted a recommendation
B) A student selected for a scholarship award
C) A school principal reviewing scholarship candidates
D) A donor who funded the scholarship
steps.kr: 350명의 지원자 중에서 4.0의 탁월한 학점과 뛰어난 지역 사회 봉사 기록을 바탕으로 선발되었습니다.

sentences: The scholarship will cover full tuition fees for the academic year, and a formal award ceremony will be held on May 10th at the university auditorium.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this letter?
choices: A) To request additional academic documents
B) To notify a student of a scholarship award and provide details
C) To inform a student of scholarship rejection
D) To request a student to reapply for the scholarship
choices_kr: 학생에게 장학금 수상을 통보하고 세부 정보 제공
steps.kr: 장학금은 해당 학년도의 전액 등록금을 충당하며, 공식 시상식이 5월 10일 대학 강당에서 개최될 예정입니다.

sentences: I am writing to let you know that your application to join our company newsletter mailing list has been confirmed.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) A subscriber requesting to be removed from the list
B) A newsletter publisher confirming a subscription
C) An email marketing compliance officer
D) A reader forwarding the newsletter to a colleague
steps.kr: 귀하의 당사 뉴스레터 메일링 리스트 가입 신청이 확인되었음을 알려드립니다.

sentences: You will now receive our monthly newsletter featuring industry news, exclusive insights, and special offers tailored to your interests.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) An existing subscriber updating their preferences
B) A person who just signed up for the newsletter
C) An advertiser interested in placing ads in the newsletter
D) An editor managing the newsletter content
steps.kr: 이제 귀하의 관심사에 맞춤화된 업계 뉴스, 독점적인 통찰 및 특별 혜택이 담긴 월간 뉴스레터를 받으실 것입니다.

sentences: If you wish to unsubscribe at any time, simply click the 'Unsubscribe' link at the bottom of any newsletter email.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To promote a specific product featured in the newsletter
B) To confirm a newsletter subscription and explain how to unsubscribe
C) To notify a subscriber of changes to the newsletter format
D) To request a subscriber to update their contact preferences
choices_kr: 뉴스레터 구독 확인 및 구독 취소 방법 안내
구독자에게 연락 환경 설정 업데이트 요청
steps.kr: 언제든지 구독을 취소하려면 뉴스레터 이메일 하단의 '구독 취소' 링크를 클릭하기만 하면 됩니다.

sentences: I am contacting you on behalf of the company to inform you that your employment contract will not be renewed upon its expiration on June 30th.
steps.question: Who is sending this email?
choices: A) An employee requesting contract renewal
B) A company representative informing of non-renewal
C) A labor union representative
D) A government employment agency
steps.kr: 6월 30일 만료 시 귀하의 고용 계약이 갱신되지 않을 것임을 알려드리기 위해 회사를 대신하여 연락드립니다.

sentences: You have been a dedicated member of our logistics team, and this decision was made solely due to the restructuring of our operations division.
steps.question: Who is the recipient of this email?
choices: A) A senior manager responsible for restructuring
B) An employee whose contract is not being renewed
C) A new hire replacing the departing employee
D) A client affected by the operational changes
steps.kr: 귀하는 물류팀의 헌신적인 팀원이었으며, 이 결정은 오직 운영 부서 구조조정으로 인해 내려진 것입니다.

sentences: We will provide you with a severance package and a strong letter of recommendation, and HR will be in touch to discuss the transition details.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
choices: A) To offer an employee a position in a different department
B) To notify an employee that their contract will not be renewed
C) To announce a temporary leave of absence policy
D) To inform an employee of disciplinary action
steps.kr: 퇴직금 패키지와 강력한 추천서를 제공할 것이며, 인사부에서 전환 세부 사항을 논의하기 위해 연락할 것입니다.
